<!--
Thanks for contributing to mini! Keep PRs small and focused — ideally one phase
or one self-contained change. See CONTRIBUTING.md for the full guide.
-->

## What does this change?

<!-- A short description of the change and the motivation behind it. -->

## Related issue

<!-- e.g. Closes #123 — or "n/a" for a trivial change. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run typecheck` passes
- [ ] `npm test` passes
- [ ] Added/updated tests for the change (or explained why none are needed)
- [ ] Updated docs (`README.md`, `docs/`) if behavior or commands changed
- [ ] Added a `CHANGELOG.md` entry under `[Unreleased]` for user-facing changes
- [ ] Code, comments and docs are in English (identifiers may stay as they are)
- [ ] The change is focused — unrelated refactors are split out
